accessPoints.title: Choose the interface, keep the model

descriptions.API: Compose and extend pipelines directly in Python.
descriptions.CLI: Validate and execute a reproducible configuration from the terminal.
descriptions.Studio: Configure, inspect, and preview the same core through a visual interface.

architecture.caption: Dependencies point inward. The core owns contracts, runtime planning, events, errors, and policies.

benchmark.title: Abstraction cost, measured
benchmark.description: Streaming stayed close to the direct loop while using about a quarter of its peak memory.
benchmark.source: Source: SEF thesis presentation. Add raw benchmark data and environment details before publication.

character.title: Species are relationships, not collectibles
character.description: Each character belongs to a habitat and a dynamic ecological network affected by group decisions.
character.caption: Character assets supplied in the RE:WILD project material.

phases: Face pollution, drought, or habitat loss.

pipeline.title: A video-to-signal pipeline in explicit stages
stages: Acquires frames from a file, camera, or continuous source.
Transforms visual data through independent, replaceable operations.
Turns frames into measures, trajectories, motion, or temporal series.
Filters, normalises, and corrects the extracted signal.
Interprets structured signals and produces analytical results.
Creates plots, media, tables, or inspectable artifacts.

useCases: Single and multi-object trajectories from continuous video.
Sparse and dense motion fields converted into structured data.
Subtle temporal variation made observable and measurable.
Realtime COCO pose estimation and gesture classification.
